center.name: Southwest Australia
center.summary: Southwest Australia is a biogeographic region in Western Australia.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This bustard will enter denser areas of vegetation after fire, and is observed on artificial cleared areas such as golf courses and farmland. The historical range in Southwest Australia included the dunes and alluvial flats of the Swan Coastal Plain, as far south as Busselton, and at the interior in what became the Wheatbelt

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Gilbert's honeyeater (Melithreptus chloropsis), also known as the Swan River honeyeater or western white-naped honeyeater, is a passerine bird of the honeyeater family Meliphagidae native to southwestern Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous treecreeper is found across Southwestern Australia, as far north as Shark Bay, and through to South Australia, as far east as the Eyre Peninsula

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: }} The western gerygone (Gerygone fusca) is a small, brownish-grey species of passerine bird, which is found in inland and south-west Australia. It is an arboreal, insectivore of open forest, woodland and dry shrubland.{{cite book |last1= Higgins|first1= P.J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Acanthorhynchus superciliosus |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22704424A253971661 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22704424A253971661.en |access-date=15 December 2025}} | image = Spinebill9256e.jpg | image_caption = Male | taxon = Acanthorhynchus superciliosus | authority = Gould, 1837 }} The western spinebill (Acanthorhynchus superciliosus) is a honeyeater found in the heath and woodland of south-western Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The western whipbird (Psophodes nigrogularis) is a passerine bird found in several scattered populations in Southwest Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Carnaby's black cockatoo (Zanda latirostris), also known as the short-billed black cockatoo, is a large black cockatoo endemic to southwest Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-capped parrot (Purpureicephalus spurius) is a species of broad-tailed parrot native to southwestern Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Baudin's black cockatoo (Zanda baudinii), also known as Baudin's cockatoo or the long-billed black cockatoo, is a species of genus Zanda found in southwest Australia
